label: WN18RR
sourceNote: Prepared from a real WN18RR backend session slice.
whyInteresting: Shows the full OMNIA workflow on one coherent cluster-centred slice.

limitations: Static interactive scenario — not a live backend session.
Sessions are not persisted; feedback is stored locally in the browser.
TransE filtering artifacts were not stored for this scenario.
